angular_transfer.description: Eight named larger-grid contact-block variants, across 32 disjoint starts and orientations, test bounded transfer beyond the Week 11 geometries.

ball_retention.description: Forty new Week 8 round-object starts compare the frozen controller alone with the active post-growth router. Exact action/outcome trace equality is required.
